title: Attack System Catalog Schema
description: Validates the attacks.json file defining available attack platforms.

systems.description: List of all available attack systems.

id.description: Unique identifier. Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores; must start with a letter.

name.description: Full display name of the attack system.

payload_kg.description: Warhead mass in kilograms. Must be greater than zero.

range_km.description: Maximum range in kilometers. Must be greater than zero.

salvo_sizes.description: Salvo sizes available for this system. Each value must be 2, 10, or 50.
